subcodes.first_line: Excellent indeed was his deed, and excellent his utterance, and excellent his meeting with them. O My Name! Thou wert created for remembrance and praise and fellowship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نعم ما عمل و نعم ما نطق و نعم ملاقاته معهم یا اسمی قد خلقت لاجل الذکر و الثناء و المعاشره
